summary: Frontend testing of 3 visual fixes on Go page: (1) GoHero centered column layout, (2) GoCategoryStrip labels not cut off, (3) GuidedGoPaths 3-column card grid. All 10 feature tests pass. Tested with dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 / Mojo as active pet.
tests_passed: TEST 1 PASS: GoHero centered column layout - avatar at top-center (data-testid='go-hero', width=1920, height=530px), full centered column matching DineHero pattern

TEST 2 PASS: Two-line stacked title - 'Travel & Go' at y=319 and 'for Mojo' at y=363 (44px below), both centered at x=853 on 1920px page. Font: large serif. Verified via span.block.font-extrabold selectors.
TEST 3 PASS: Soul chips (Indie breed + Goa city) visible in centered row below title in hero area
TEST 4 PASS: Mira quote card centered below chips - 'Tell me where Mojo is going and I'll arrange everything — flights, boarding, and the perfect travel kit.'
TEST 5 PASS: GoCategoryStrip - all 6 labels fully visible: Safety, Calming, Carriers, Feeding, Health & Docs, Stay & Board. Height=83px (not fixed 72px). No label cut-off.
TEST 6 PASS: GuidedGoPaths 3-column card grid confirmed - 6 cards in 2 rows × 3 columns. Cards 1-3 at same y=-111 with x=480, 805, 1131 (different columns). Cards 4-6 at y=308.
TEST 7 PASS: Each GoPath card has correct anatomy: icon box (emoji), title (h3), description, step chips (up to 3 + '+N more'), Mira Pick badge (★ Mira Pick), chevron (›)
TEST 8 PASS: Card hover shows border highlight (2px solid accent color) and translateY(-3px) = matrix(1,0,0,1,0,-3) animation
TEST 9 PASS: GoPath card click opens PathFlowModal - fixed overlay, modal title, step indicator, Mira knows note, option rows. Close button (✕) works.
TEST 10 PASS: GoTabBar shows 3 centered pill tabs below GoCategoryStrip: 'Go Essentials', 'Find a Stay', 'Book a Service'
design_observations: GoHero: Avatar (Mojo photo with Soul 95% badge) at top center. Eyebrow chip '✦ Travel & Go for Mojo'. Two-line serif title in teal+white. Subtitle text. Chips (Indie + Goa). Mira quote card. Chevron. All centered. Matches DineHero pattern exactly.
GoCategoryStrip: 6 pills with icon (34×34 rounded box) + label text below. Height=83px. Scrollable with arrow buttons. Labels fully visible including 'Health & Docs' and 'Stay & Board'.

GuidedGoPaths: Clean 3-column grid. Each card has accentBg background, 52×52 icon box, h3 title, description, step chips with accent-colored text, Mira Pick badge, and › chevron. Hover: border+translateY(-3px)+boxShadow animation.
PathFlowModal: Gradient header (accent color), step indicator dots, Mira knows card, step label uppercase, option rows with radio-style selection, Continue →/ Hand to Concierge® → button.
critical_code_review_comments: All 3 visual fixes correctly implemented. No new code issues found.
GoHero correctly uses section.relative.w-full with inner div.flex-col.items-center.max-w-5xl.mx-auto — matches DineHero pattern exactly.
GoCategoryStrip button no longer has height:72px — uses minWidth:80, padding:12px 10px — labels not cut off.
GuidedGoPaths correctly uses CSS grid with guided-go-paths-grid class (3 cols desktop, 2 cols tablet, 1 col mobile) with GoPathCard components.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 with Mojo as active pet (soul_score: 95%, breed: Indie, city: Goa, allergy: Chicken)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 visual fixes on Go page verified passing: (1) GoHero centered column layout matches DineHero, (2) GoCategoryStrip all 6 labels visible (83px height, no cutoff), (3) GuidedGoPaths 3-column card grid (not accordion). Test credentials: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123. Login → pet-home (wait 4s) → /go (wait 5s). Known pre-existing issues: Find a Stay 'No results in Goa', TripProfile soul score shows '—%' on initial open.
